indication: Trametinib in combination with dabrafenib is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with Stage III melanoma with a BRAF V600 mutation, following complete resection.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized trametinib as a monotherapy or in combination with dabrafenib for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with stage III melanoma with a BRAF V600 variant, following complete resection.

document.name: Mekinist (trametinib) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Novartis Europharm Limited. Mekinist (trametinib) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/mekinist-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised March 2024. Accessed March 19, 2024.
